channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: DOJ Opens Grand Jury Investigation Into UAW President Shawn Fain
item.description:
The U.S. Department of Justice has opened a grand jury investigation into UAW President Shawn Fain over union governance allegations. Read the latest updates.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/investigation/doj-grand-jury-investigation-uaw-president-shawn-fain
